Operation 'lookupBulkIps' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains input format and plan requirements well, but lacks clarity about the output structure. AI agents need to know the response format (array of geolocation objects) to properly handle and interpret results. Added explicit output structure information.

data.current_description: Look up geolocation data for multiple IPv4 or IPv6 addresses at once (comma-separated). Available on Professional Plus plan and higher.
data.description_suggestion: Look up geolocation data for multiple IPv4 or IPv6 addresses simultaneously using comma-separated format. Returns an array of geolocation response objects, one per IP address. Available on Professional Plus plan and higher.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains input format and plan requirements well, but lacks clarity about the output structure. AI agents need to know the response format (array of geolocation objects) to properly handle and interpret results. Added explicit output structure information.
